## Meeting Purpose

[Align on website sitemap and production sequence for Surge AI's new website launch.](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on core foundational pages + one custom landing page for initial launch](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Content migration mostly set; new design to be built and launched as quickly as possible](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Agreed on high-level sitemap structure, with some details TBD (e.g., research page, product pages)](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Need for founder photos and more detailed content requirements for company page](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

## Topics

### Website Launch Strategy

  - [Initial focus: core foundational pages + one custom landing page](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Plan to build and launch new version entirely, rather than updating existing site](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Content migration mostly ready; can be exported from current Webflow site](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Aim for quick launch with ability to modify using default components](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

### Sitemap Structure

  - [Home page: Will include product callouts and research section for V1](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Products: Individual pages eventually, but callout on homepage sufficient for V1](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Research: Agreed on having a dedicated page (e.g., surgeai.com/research)](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Company: Confirmed need for a company page to help sell the story](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Blog: Comprehensive structure discussed (feature articles, categories, authors, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [TBD items: Specific treatment for pillars/principles, careers page placement](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Design and Content Requirements

  - [Jean to handle foundational design for key areas (home, about, blog template, landing pages)](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Need more detailed content requirements for company page](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Placeholder for high-resolution founder images to be included in design](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Blog structure to include meta category/data box for future flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### Workflow and Collaboration

  - [Renato's team to provide requirements, structure, and ideally copy](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Jean to create system and components for blog, allowing team to "go to town" on content](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Open line of communication established for ongoing updates and additions](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Renato's team to provide Figma access once iterations are complete](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Jean to grant necessary Webflow access for base page migration](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Develop detailed content requirements for company page (assigned to Jason or George)](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Prioritize founder photo shoot for high-quality website assets](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Jean to systemize blog components for team's use](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Renato to keep Jean updated on any additions from Jason](https://fathom.video/share/WibgN95gkjQ4zeehz1DyiDJXKijCQyVN?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
